Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. A tale about fixing eBPF spinlock issues in the Linux kernel 73 upvotes, 2 comments
  2. Show HN: Fatal Core Dump – A debugging murder mystery played with GDB 56 upvotes, 1 comments
  3. JPEG Compression 51 upvotes, 1 comments
  4. A Decade of Slug 548 upvotes, 50 comments
  5. More than 135 open hardware devices flashable with your own firmware 168 upvotes, 12 comments
  6. Mistral AI Releases Forge 318 upvotes, 51 comments
  7. Unsloth Studio 257 upvotes, 50 comments
  8. Show HN: Sub-millisecond VM sandboxes using CoW memory forking 124 upvotes, 25 comments
  9. Launch HN: Kita (YC W26) – Automate credit review in emerging markets 37 upvotes, 5 comments
  10. Launch an autonomous AI agent with sandboxed execution in 2 lines of code 29 upvotes, 4 comments
  11. Electron microscopy shows ‘mouse bite’ defects in semiconductors 54 upvotes, 11 comments
  12. Edge.js: Run Node apps inside a WebAssembly sandbox 128 upvotes, 36 comments
  13. Microsoft's 'unhackable' Xbox One has been hacked by 'Bliss' 634 upvotes, 224 comments
  14. Switzerland Built an Alternative to BGP 29 upvotes, 5 comments
  15. Why AI systems don't learn – On autonomous learning from cognitive science 90 upvotes, 27 comments
  16. It Took Me 30 Years to Solve This VFX Problem – Green Screen Problem [video] 223 upvotes, 93 comments
  17. The pleasures of poor product design 83 upvotes, 30 comments
  18. Python 3.15's JIT is now back on track 344 upvotes, 170 comments
  19. Get Shit Done: A meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven dev system 298 upvotes, 146 comments
  20. Leviathan (1651) 43 upvotes, 15 comments
  21. Review of Microsoft's ClearType Font Collection (2005) 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  22. Have a Fucking Website 260 upvotes, 137 comments
  23. Ryugu asteroid samples contain all DNA and RNA building blocks 225 upvotes, 123 comments
  24. I Simulated 38,612 Countryle Games to Find the Best Strategy 15 upvotes, 4 comments
  25. Write up of my homebrew CPU build 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  26. SSH has no Host header 79 upvotes, 61 comments
  27. Show HN: The Lottery of Life 10 upvotes, 7 comments
  28. Forget Flags and Scripts: Just Rename the File 18 upvotes, 21 comments
  29. Honda is killing its EVs 301 upvotes, 621 comments
  30. Ndea (YC W26) is hiring a symbolic RL search guidance lead 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 3:30pm, 18 March 2026. Source here.
